zh.lifeSummary: 當Galfridus De Beauchamp於1445年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾波維其可時，他的母親Margaret De Ferrers20歲，父親John Beauchamp33歲。他於1477年與Elizabeth de Trigoz在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾賓納頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Galfridus De Beauchamp于1445年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾波維其可时，他的母亲Margaret De Ferrers20岁，父亲John Beauchamp33岁。他于1477年与Elizabeth de Trigoz在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年在英国英格兰可瓦爾賓納頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

en.lifeSummary: When Galfridus De Beauchamp was born in 1445, in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his mother, Margaret De Ferrers, was 20 and his father, John Beauchamp, was 33. He married Elizabeth de Trigoz in 1477, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1487, in Binnerton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Galfridus De Beauchamp est né en 1445, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, sa mère, Margaret De Ferrers, avait 20 ans et son père, John Beauchamp, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Trigoz en 1477, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1487, à Binnerton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Galfridus De Beauchamp 1445 in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Margaret De Ferrers 20 und sein Vater John Beauchamp 33. Er hat 1477 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Trigoz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1487 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Binnerton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Galfridus De Beauchamp è nato il nel 1445 nel Powick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo madre, Margaret De Ferrers, aveva 20 anni e il suo padre, John Beauchamp, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Trigoz nel 1477, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1487, nel Binnerton, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Galfridus De Beauchampが1445年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックで生まれた時，母Margaret De Ferrersは20歳，父John Beauchampは33歳であった。1477年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでElizabeth de Trigozと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルビネルトンで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Galfridus De Beauchamp(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 파윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Ferrers(은)는 20세였고, 그의 아버지 John Beauchamp(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Elizabeth de Trigoz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 빈르턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Galfridus De Beauchamp nasceu em 1445, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, sua mãe, Margaret De Ferrers, tinha 20 anos e seu pai, John Beauchamp, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Trigoz em 1477, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1487, em Binnerton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Galfridus De Beauchamp родился в 1445 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его матери по имени Margaret De Ferrers было 20 лет, а отцу, которого звали John Beauchamp, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Trigoz в 1477 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1487 г. в местности бинниртон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Galfridus De Beauchamp nació en 1445, en Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su mamá, Margaret De Ferrers, tenía 20 años y su papá, John Beauchamp, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Trigoz en 1477, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1487, en Binnerton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
